![](_page_275_Picture_0.jpeg)

| Requirements and Testing Procedures                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                          | Guidance                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 12.5 PCI DSS scope is documented and validated.                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Defined Approach<br>Requirements                                                                                                                          | Defined Approach Testing Procedures                                                                                                      | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| An inventory of system components that are<br>12.5.1<br>in scope for PCI DSS, including a description of<br>function/use, is maintained and kept current. | Examine the inventory to verify it includes<br>12.5.1.a<br>all in-scope system components and a description<br>of function/use for each. | Maintaining a current list of all system<br>components will enable an organization to define<br>the scope of its environment and implement PCI<br>DSS requirements accurately and efficiently. |
|                                                                                                                                                           | Interview personnel to verify the inventory<br>12.5.1.b<br>is kept current.                                                              | Without an inventory, some system components<br>could be overlooked and be inadvertently<br>excluded from the organization's configuration                                                     |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                          | standards.<br>Good Practice                                                                                                                                                                    |
| All system components in scope for PCI DSS are<br>identified and known.                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                          | If an entity keeps an inventory of all assets, those<br>system components in scope for PCI DSS should<br>be clearly identifiable among the other assets.                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                          | Inventories should include containers or images<br>that may be instantiated.                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                          | Assigning an owner to the inventory helps to<br>ensure the inventory stays current.                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                          | Methods to maintain an inventory include as a<br>database, as a series of files, or<br>in an inventory<br>management tool.                                                                     |

| PCI DSS scope is documented and<br>12.5.2<br>confirmed by the entity at least once every 12<br>months and upon significant change to the in-scope<br>environment. At a minimum, the scoping validation<br>includes: | Examine documented results of scope<br>12.5.2.a<br>reviews and interview personnel to verify that the<br>reviews are performed:<br>•<br>At least once every 12 months. | Frequent validation of PCI DSS scope helps to<br>ensure PCI DSS scope remains up to date and<br>aligned with changing business objectives, and<br>therefore that security controls are protecting all<br>appropriate system components. |
| •<br>Identifying all data flows for the various payment                                                                                                                                                             | •<br>After significant changes to the in-scope<br>environment.                                                                                                         | Good Practice<br>Accurate scoping involves critically evaluating the                                                                                                                                                                    |
| stages (for example, authorization, capture<br>settlement, chargebacks, and refunds) and<br>acceptance channels (for example, card-present,<br>card-not-present, and e-commerce).                                   | 12.5.2.b<br>Examine documented results of scope<br>reviews performed by the entity to verify that PCI<br>DSS scoping confirmation activity includes all                | CDE and all connected system components to<br>determine the necessary coverage for PCI DSS<br>requirements. Scoping activities, including careful<br>analysis and ongoing monitoring, help to ensure                                    |
| •<br>Updating all data-flow<br>diagrams per<br>Requirement 1.2.4.                                                                                                                                                   | elements specified in this requirement.                                                                                                                                | that in-scope systems are appropriately secured.<br>When documenting account data locations, the                                                                                                                                        |
| •<br>Identifying all<br>locations where account data<br>is<br>stored, processed, and transmitted, including but<br>not limited to: 1) any locations outside of the                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                        | entity can consider creating a table or<br>spreadsheet that includes the following<br>information:                                                                                                                                      |
| currently defined CDE, 2) applications<br>that<br>process<br>CHD, 3)<br>transmissions between<br>systems and networks, and 4) file backups.                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                        | •<br>Data stores (databases, files, cloud, etc.),<br>including the purpose of data storage and the<br>retention period,                                                                                                                 |
| •<br>Identifying all system components in the CDE,<br>connected to the CDE, or that<br>could impact<br>security of the CDE.                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                        | •<br>Which CHD elements are stored (PAN, expiry<br>date, cardholder name, and/or any elements<br>of SAD prior to completion of authorization),                                                                                          |
| •<br>Identifying all segmentation controls in use and<br>the environment(s) from which the CDE is<br>segmented, including justification for                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                        | •<br>How data is secured (type of encryption and<br>strength, hashing algorithm and strength,<br>truncation, tokenization),                                                                                                             |
| environments being out of scope.<br>•<br>Identifying all connections from third-party<br>entities with access to the CDE.                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                        | •<br>How access to data stores is logged,<br>including a<br>description of logging<br>mechanism(s) in use (enterprise solution,                                                                                                         |
| •<br>Confirming that all identified data flows, account<br>data, system components, segmentation                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                        | application level, operating system level,<br>etc.).                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| controls, and connections from third parties with<br>access to the<br>CDE are included in scope.                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                        | (continued on next page)                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

![](_page_277_Picture_0.jpeg)

| Requirements and Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                | Guidance                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Customized Approach Objective<br>PCI DSS scope is verified periodically, and after<br>significant changes, by comprehensive analysis and<br>appropriate technical measures.                                                        | In addition to internal systems and networks, all<br>connections from third-party entities—for<br>example, business partners, entities providing<br>remote support services, and other service<br>providers—need to be identified to determine<br>inclusion for PCI DSS scope. Once the in-scope                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Applicability Notes<br>This annual confirmation of PCI DSS scope is an                                                                                                                                                             | connections have been identified, the applicable<br>PCI DSS controls can be implemented to reduce<br>the risk of a third-party connection being used to                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| activity expected to be performed by the entity<br>under assessment, and is not the same, nor is it<br>intended to be replaced by, the scoping confirmation<br>performed by the entity's assessor during the<br>annual assessment. | compromise an entity's CDE.<br>A data discovery tool or methodology can be used<br>to facilitate identifying all sources and locations of<br>PAN, and to look for PAN that resides on systems<br>and networks outside the currently defined CDE<br>or in unexpected places within the defined CDE—<br>for example, in an error log or memory dump file.<br>This approach can help ensure that previously<br>unknown locations of PAN are detected and that<br>the PAN is either eliminated or properly secured. |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Further Information                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For additional guidance, refer to Information<br>Supplement: Guidance for PCI DSS Scoping and<br>Network Segmentation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

![](_page_278_Picture_0.jpeg)

| Requirements and Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Guidance                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Defined Approach<br>Requirements                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Defined Approach Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 12.5.2.1<br>Additional requirement for service<br>providers only:<br>PCI DSS scope is documented and<br>confirmed by the entity at least once every six<br>months and upon<br>significant change<br>to the in-scope<br>environment. At a minimum, the scoping validation<br>includes all the elements specified in Requirement<br>12.5.2. | 12.5.2.1.a<br>Additional testing procedure for<br>service provider assessments only:<br>Examine<br>documented results of scope reviews and interview<br>personnel to verify that<br>reviews per Requirement<br>12.5.2 are performed:<br>•<br>At least once every six months, and<br>•<br>After significant changes<br>12.5.2.1.b<br>Additional testing procedure for | Service providers typically have access to greater<br>volumes of cardholder data than do merchants,<br>or<br>can provide an entry point that can be exploited to<br>then compromise multiple other entities. Service<br>providers also typically have larger and more<br>complex networks that are subject to more<br>frequent change. The probability of overlooked<br>changes to scope in complex and dynamic<br>networks is greater in service providers'<br>environments. |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Examine<br>service provider assessments only:<br>documented results of scope reviews to verify that<br>scoping validation includes all elements specified<br>in Requirement 12.5.2.                                                                                                                                                                                  | Validating PCI DSS scope more frequently is<br>likely to discover such overlooked changes before<br>they can be exploited by an attacker.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| The accuracy of PCI DSS scope is verified to be<br>continuously accurate by comprehensive analysis<br>and appropriate technical measures.                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Applicability Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| This requirement applies only when the entity being<br>assessed is a service provider.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| This requirement is a best practice until 31 March<br>2025, after which it will be required and must be<br>fully considered during a PCI DSS assessment.                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

| 12.5.3<br>Additional requirement for service<br>Significant changes to<br>providers only:<br>organizational structure result in a documented<br>(internal) review of the impact to PCI DSS scope<br>and applicability of controls, with results<br>communicated to executive management. | 12.5.3.a<br>Additional testing procedure for<br>Examine<br>service provider assessments only:<br>policies and procedures to verify that processes<br>are defined such that a significant change to<br>organizational structure results in documented<br>review of the impact to PCI DSS scope and<br>applicability of controls. | An organization's structure and management<br>define the requirements and protocol for effective<br>and secure operations. Changes to this structure<br>could have negative effects to existing controls<br>and frameworks by reallocating or removing<br>resources that once supported PCI DSS controls<br>or inheriting new responsibilities that may not<br>have established controls in place. Therefore, it is<br>important to revisit PCI DSS scope and controls<br>when there are changes to an organization's<br>structure and management to ensure controls are<br>in place and active.<br>Examples |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | 12.5.3.b<br>Additional testing procedure for<br>Examine<br>service provider assessments only:<br>documentation (for example, meeting minutes) and                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| PCI DSS scope is confirmed after significant                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | interview responsible personnel to verify that<br>significant changes to organizational structure                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| organizational change.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | resulted in documented reviews that included all<br>are not limited to,<br>company mergers or<br>elements specified in this requirement,<br>with results<br>acquisitions, and significant changes or<br>communicated to executive management.<br>reassignments<br>security controls.                                            | Changes to organizational structure include, but                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Applicability Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | of personnel with responsibility for                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| This requirement applies only when the entity being<br>assessed is a service provider.                                                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| This requirement is a best practice until 31 March<br>2025, after which it will be required and must be<br>fully considered during a PCI DSS assessment.                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

![](_page_280_Picture_0.jpeg)

|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Requirements and Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Guidance                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 12.6 Security awareness education is an ongoing activity.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Defined Approach<br>Requirements                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Defined Approach Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| A formal security awareness program is<br>12.6.1<br>implemented to make all personnel aware of the<br>entity's information security policy and procedures,<br>and their role in protecting the cardholder data.                                                                                                                  | Examine the security awareness program to<br>12.6.1<br>verify it provides awareness to all personnel about<br>the entity's information security policy and<br>procedures,<br>and personnel's role in protecting the<br>cardholder data. | If personnel are not educated about their<br>company's information security policies and<br>procedures and their own security responsibilities,<br>security safeguards and processes that have<br>been implemented may become ineffective<br>through unintentional errors or intentional actions.       |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Personnel are knowledgeable about the threat<br>landscape, their responsibility for the operation of<br>relevant security controls, and are able to access<br>assistance and guidance when required.                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Defined Approach<br>Requirements                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Defined Approach Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| The security awareness program is:<br>12.6.2<br>•<br>Reviewed at least once every 12 months, and<br>•<br>Updated as needed to address any new threats<br>and vulnerabilities that may impact the security<br>of the entity's CDE, or the information provided<br>to personnel about their role in protecting<br>cardholder data. | Examine security awareness program<br>12.6.2<br>content, evidence of reviews, and interview<br>personnel to verify that the security awareness<br>program is in accordance with all elements<br>specified in this requirement.          | The threat environment and an entity's<br>defenses<br>are not static.<br>As such, the security awareness<br>program materials must be updated as frequently<br>as needed to ensure that the education received<br>by personnel<br>is up<br>to<br>date and represents the<br>current threat environment. |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| The content of security awareness material is<br>reviewed and updated periodically.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Applicability Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| This requirement is a best practice until 31 March<br>2025, after which it will be required and must be<br>fully considered during a PCI DSS assessment.                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|

| Personnel receive security awareness<br>12.6.3<br>training as follows:<br>•<br>Upon hire and at least once every 12 months.<br>•<br>Multiple methods of communication are used. | Examine security awareness program<br>12.6.3.a<br>records to verify that personnel attend security<br>awareness training upon hire and at least once<br>every 12 months. | Training of personnel ensures they receive the<br>information about the importance of information<br>security and that they understand their role in<br>protecting the organization.<br>Requiring an acknowledgment<br>by personnel helps |
| •<br>Personnel acknowledge at least once every 12<br>months that<br>they have read and understood the<br>information security policy and procedures.                            | Examine security awareness program<br>12.6.3.b<br>materials to verify the program includes multiple<br>methods of communicating awareness and<br>educating personnel.    | ensure that they have read and understood the<br>security policies and procedures, and that they<br>have made and will continue to make a<br>commitment to comply with these policies.<br>Good Practice                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                 | Interview personnel to verify they have<br>12.6.3.c<br>completed awareness training and are aware of<br>their role in protecting cardholder data.                        | Entities<br>may incorporate new-hire training as part<br>of the Human Resources onboarding process.<br>Training should outline the security-related "dos"                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                 | 12.6.3.d Examine security awareness program<br>materials and personnel acknowledgments to                                                                                | and "don'ts." Periodic refresher training reinforces<br>key security processes and procedures that may<br>be forgotten or bypassed.                                                                                                       |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                   | verify that personnel acknowledge at least once<br>every 12 months that they have read and                                                                               | Entities should consider requiring security                                                                                                                                                                                               |

|                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

| Security awareness training includes<br>12.6.3.1<br>awareness of threats and vulnerabilities that could<br>impact the security of the CDE, including but not                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Examine security awareness training<br>12.6.3.1<br>content to verify it includes all elements specified in<br>this requirement. | Educating personnel on how to detect, react to,<br>and report potential phishing and related attacks<br>and social engineering attempts is essential to<br>minimizing the probability of successful<br>attacks.                                                            |
| limited to:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                 | Good Practice                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| •<br>Phishing and related attacks.<br>•<br>Social<br>engineering.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |                                                                                                                                 | An effective security<br>awareness program should<br>include examples of phishing emails and periodic<br>testing to determine the prevalence of personnel                                                                                                                  |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                 | reporting such attacks. Training material an entity<br>can consider for this topic include:                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Personnel are knowledgeable about their own<br>human vulnerabilities and how threat actors will                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                                 | •<br>How to identify phishing and other social<br>engineering attacks.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| attempt to exploit such vulnerabilities. Personnel are<br>able to access assistance and guidance when<br>required.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                 | •<br>How to react to suspected phishing and social<br>engineering.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                                 | •<br>Where and how to report suspected phishing<br>and social engineering<br>activity.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Applicability Notes<br>See Requirement 5.4.1 for guidance on the<br>difference between technical and automated<br>controls to detect and protect users from phishing<br>attacks, and this requirement for providing users<br>security awareness training about phishing<br>and<br>social engineering. These are two separate and<br>distinct requirements, and one is not met by<br>implementing controls required by the other one.<br>This requirement is a best practice until 31 March<br>2025, after which it will be required and must be<br>fully considered during a PCI DSS assessment. |                                                                                                                                 | An emphasis on reporting allows the organization<br>to reward positive behavior, to optimize technical<br>defenses (see Requirement 5.4.1), and to take<br>immediate action to remove similar phishing<br>emails that evaded technical defenses from<br>recipient inboxes. |

| Requirements and Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Guidance                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 12.7 Personnel are screened to reduce risks from insider threats.                                                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Defined Approach<br>Requirements                                                                                                                                                                | Defined Approach Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Potential personnel who will have access to<br>12.7.1<br>the CDE are screened, within the constraints of<br>local laws, prior to hire to minimize the risk of<br>attacks from internal sources. | Interview responsible Human Resource<br>12.7.1<br>department management to verify that screening is<br>conducted, within the constraints of local laws,<br>prior to hiring potential personnel who will have<br>access to the CDE. | Performing thorough screening prior to hiring<br>potential personnel who are expected to be given<br>access to the CDE<br>provides entities with the<br>information necessary to make informed risk<br>decisions regarding personnel they hire that will<br>have access to the CDE.                                                  |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Other benefits of screening potential personnel<br>include helping to ensure workplace safety and                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| The risk related to allowing new members of staff<br>access to the CDE is understood and managed.                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | confirming information provided by prospective<br>employees on their resumes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Good Practice                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Applicability Notes<br>For those potential personnel to be hired for                                                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Entities should consider screening for existing<br>personnel anytime they transfer into roles where<br>they have access to the CDE from roles where<br>they did not have this access.                                                                                                                                                |
| positions such as store cashiers, who only have<br>access to one card number at a time when<br>facilitating a transaction, this requirement is a<br>recommendation only.                        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | To be effective, the level of screening should be<br>appropriate for the position. For example,<br>positions requiring greater responsibility or that<br>have administrative access<br>to critical data or<br>systems may warrant more detailed or more<br>frequent screening than positions with less<br>responsibility and access. |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Screening options can include, as appropriate for<br>the entity's region,<br>previous employment history,<br>review of public information/social media<br>resources,<br>criminal record, credit history, and<br>reference checks.                                                                                                    |

|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | 12.8 Risk to information assets associated with third-party service provider (TPSP) relationships is managed.                                                                                                                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Defined Approach<br>Requirements                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Defined Approach Testing Procedures                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| A list of all third-party service providers<br>12.8.1<br>(TPSPs) with which account data<br>is shared or that<br>could affect the security of account data is<br>maintained, including a description for each of the<br>services provided. | Examine policies and procedures to verify<br>12.8.1.a<br>that processes are defined to maintain a list of<br>TPSPs, including a description for each of the<br>services provided, for all TPSPs with whom<br>account data is shared or that could affect the<br>security of account data. | Maintaining a list of all TPSPs identifies where<br>potential risk extends outside the organization<br>and defines the organization's extended attack<br>surface.<br>Examples<br>Different types of TPSPs include those that:                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Examine documentation to verify that a<br>12.8.1.b<br>list of all TPSPs is maintained that includes a<br>description of the services provided.                                                                                                                                            | •<br>Store, process, or transmit account data on<br>the entity's behalf (such as<br>payment<br>gateways, payment processors, payment                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Customized Approach Objective                                                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | service providers (PSPs),<br>and off-site<br>storage<br>providers).<br>•<br>Manage system components<br>included in the<br>entity's PCI DSS assessment (such as<br>providers of network security control<br>services, anti-malware services, and security                                                              |
| Records are maintained of TPSPs and the services<br>provided.                                                                                                                                                                              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Applicability Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| The use of a PCI DSS compliant TPSP does not<br>make an entity PCI DSS compliant, nor does it<br>remove the entity's responsibility for its own PCI<br>DSS compliance.                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | incident and event management (SIEM);<br>contact and call centers; web-hosting<br>companies; and<br>IaaS, PaaS, SaaS,<br>and<br>FaaS<br>cloud providers).<br>•<br>Could impact the security of the entity's CDE<br>(such as<br>vendors providing support via<br>remote access,<br>and bespoke software<br>developers). |
